title: GrantRank
description: Addon for LuckPerms, which allows you to assign ranks and permissions interactively.
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc1c508f8dc5fecce654563773d3492fb7df3089_0.webp)

**What can I do with this plugin?**
With GrantRank, you can assign ranks and permissions to users using a fully customizable interactive menu. You can customize the rank/permission duration, context, confirmation, and the ability to specify a reason for the grant.

**Important: This plugin works as an addon to LuckPerms. Therefore, it's vitally important that this be your primary permissions plugin.**

**Wiki:** [GrantRank Wiki](https://noxelar.gitbook.io/grantrank)

Grant a rank:
![rank](https://i.imgur.com/ywdUTAS.gif)

Grant a permission:
![perm](https://i.imgur.com/wsDdE1J.gif)

View logs:
![logs](https://i.imgur.com/3LymbZ0.gif)

**Dependencies:**
- LuckPerms (Necessary): [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net/download)
 

**Commands:**
- /grant (player): Main command, to open a player's grants menu.
- /grants (player): View the player's current grants.
- /gadmin logs: View the global logs.
- /gadmin reload: Reload the plugin and its configuration files.


**Permissions:**
- grant.admin - Reload the plugin and receive updates.
- grant.logs.global - View global grant logs.
- grant.logs.player - View the player's current grants.
- grant.use - Use the main command /grant (player).
- grant.give.rank.(rank) - Give a rank. Replace "(rank)" with the exact name of the rank.
- grant.give.rank.* - Give all available ranks.
- grant.give.permission - Give permissions to a player.
- grant.revoke.rank.* - Revoke all available ranks.
- grant.revoke.permission - Revoke permissions revoke a player's permissions.
- grant.notify - Receive a notification when a grant is given.
- grant.* - Full access.

**Discord Support:**
You can get help or report any bugs with the plugin here. To do so, please use the "grant-rank" channel.
Join to the discord here: [Discord](https://discord.gg/aXE6kCtTjx)
